note: The official Programme page requires 9 units of School Core Courses: COMM1015 and COMM2035 plus one of COMM2026, COMM2027 and COMM2036. The Journalism and Digital Media Major page publishes 18 units of Major Required Courses, a section labelled 31 units of Concentration Courses, 6 units of Major Elective Courses and a 3-unit Honours Project. It offers Journalism and Data and Media Communication concentrations and the displayed stream rules are retained exactly. The page labels the Data and Media Communication General Stream elective pool as “the following 14 courses” but displays 20 coded courses; it also contains path-level unit totals that do not consistently reconcile with the stated 31-unit Concentration total. This supplement records every displayed coded course and the conflicting labels without inferring a correction. Courses repeated across required, stream and elective lists are stored once with all official roles. The Public Relations and Advertising Major page publishes 28 units of Major Required Courses, 18 units of Concentration Courses, 6 units of Major Elective Courses and a 3-unit Honours Project; its Advertising and Branding and Public Relations concentration rules are retained. University Language Courses, General Education Courses and Free Electives are excluded. No Year or Term is assigned because the official requirement tables do not specify course timing.
